rationale: Review 1's finding is accurate (the call at convInv_mul_cancel:115 passes f.ofConv : H →ₐ[R] A to a lemma whose implicit A/B binders resolve to our H/A, which typechecks only via that non-obvious inference) and directly impacts proof quality/clarity; acting on it by adding (A:=H)(B:=A) or a comment produces a strictly better-maintained proof than the status quo. Review 2's approve misses this, and no other material differences exist.
